ohmyclaude-fs.description: Plugin-owned filesystem helpers. Currently exposes one tool: `tree` (trackable, named MCP tool that replaces anonymous Bash `tree` invocations). Stdlib-only Node implementation — no external dependencies.

code-review-graph.description: Tree-sitter structural graph for impact-aware code review. Exposes 28 tools (semantic_search_nodes_tool, query_graph_tool, get_impact_radius_tool, get_review_context_tool, get_minimal_context_tool, …). Upstream: tirth8205/code-review-graph (MIT, Python 3.10+). Runtime prerequisite: `uv` on PATH — fetches and caches the package on first invocation. Graph database persists under `.code-review-graph/` at the repo root (auto-gitignored by the upstream tool). Opt-in: deny the approval prompt to skip; SessionStart setup hook writes `.claude/ohmyclaude.local.yaml` with detection status.
